quality.rationale: 多步张量协变微分与对称性消去推导，标准广义相对论场方程构造

origin.question:
Problem 14.13. The stress-energy tensor of a massless scalar field is
taken to be
$$
\mathbf {T}_{\mu 
u} = (4 \pi)^{- 1} ( oldsymbol {\Phi}_{, \mu}  oldsymbol {\Phi}_{, 
u} -  rac {1}{2} \mathbf {g}_{\mu 
u}  oldsymbol {\Phi}_{, \alpha}  oldsymbol {\Phi}^{, \alpha}) .
$$
Derive the equation of motion of this scalar field from $\mathbf{T}^{\mu 
u}_{;
u} = 0$
